aboutPage.title: About Douro Bats Padel
aboutPage.subtitle: Your premier padel tournament management platform
aboutPage.missionParagraph1: Douro Bats Padel is dedicated to bringing the padel community together through organized, competitive, and fun tournaments. We believe in creating an inclusive environment where players of all skill levels can compete, improve, and enjoy the sport they love.
aboutPage.missionParagraph2: Our platform simplifies tournament management, player rankings, and event organization, making it easier than ever to participate in competitive padel.
aboutPage.competitiveTournamentsDescription: Participate in professionally organized tournaments with fair matchmaking and transparent scoring systems.
aboutPage.playerRankingsDescription: Track your progress with our comprehensive ranking system that rewards consistent performance and skill development.
aboutPage.communityDrivenDescription: Join a vibrant community of padel enthusiasts, make new friends, and connect with players who share your passion.
aboutPage.easyEventManagementDescription: Simple registration, automated draws, and real-time updates make participating in events hassle-free.
aboutPage.storyParagraph1: Founded in Porto, Portugal, Douro Bats Padel emerged from a passion for the sport and a desire to create a better tournament experience for players and organizers alike.
aboutPage.storyParagraph2: What started as a small local tournament series has grown into a comprehensive platform serving the padel community with state-of-the-art technology and a commitment to fair play.
aboutPage.storyParagraph3: Today, we continue to innovate and improve, always listening to our community and striving to provide the best possible experience for everyone involved in the sport.
aboutPage.valueFairPlayDescription: We believe in transparent rules and equal opportunities for all players.
aboutPage.valueCommunityDescription: Building lasting connections and friendships through sport.
aboutPage.valueExcellenceDescription: Continuously improving our platform and services.
aboutPage.valueInclusivityDescription: Welcoming players of all backgrounds and skill levels.

generateDraw.title: Generate Draw
generateDraw.description: Configure and generate the tournament draw
generateDraw.drawPublishedWarning: This draw is currently published and visible to players.
generateDraw.drawPublishedInstructions: To generate a new draw, you must first unpublish or delete the existing draw from the draw view page.
generateDraw.drawExistsWarning: A draw has already been generated for this event.
generateDraw.drawExistsInstructions: To generate a new draw, you must first delete the existing draw from the draw view page.
generateDraw.insufficientPlayersDescription: You have {confirmedCount} confirmed players, but only {playersInDraw} can form complete teams (multiple of 4).
generateDraw.courtCapacityInfo: You have capacity for {maxPlayers} players ({mastersCourts} MASTERS courts + {explorersCourts} EXPLORERS courts) but only need {courtsNeeded} courts.
generateDraw.considerReducingCourts: Consider reducing the number of courts to avoid unnecessary costs.
generateDraw.excessPlayersDescription: You have {confirmedCount} confirmed players but only {mastersCourts} courts for MASTERS and {explorersCourts} courts for EXPLORERS (max {maxPlayers} players total).
generateDraw.playersInDrawInfo: {playersInDraw} players (top-rated) will be included in the draw, and {waitlistedPlayers} players will be waitlisted.
generateDraw.courtOptimizationDescription: With {playersInDraw} players, you only need {courtsNeeded} court(s).
generateDraw.courtAllocationInfo: You have {mastersCourts} courts for MASTERS and {explorersCourts} courts for EXPLORERS.
generateDraw.tierConfigurationDescription: How players will be split into MASTERS and EXPLORERS tiers
generateDraw.eventNotFrozen: Event must be frozen to generate draw. Go to event details to freeze it.
generateDraw.excessPlayersWarning: Need at least 4 players to generate draw
generateDraw.courtSelectionDescription: Choose which courts to use for the draw. Selected: {selectedMasters} MASTERS + {selectedExplorers} EXPLORERS (capacity: {maxPlayers} players)
generateDraw.drawOptionsDescription: Configure how the draw should be generated
generateDraw.balanceTeamStrengthDescription: Create balanced teams based on player ratings
generateDraw.allowTierMixingDescription: Allow Masters and Explorers to play together if needed
generateDraw.allPlayersIncluded: All confirmed players will be included in the draw
generateDraw.topRatedPlayersIncluded: Top {count} players by rating will be included in the draw
generateDraw.waitlistedPlayersDescription: These players will not be included in the draw due to court capacity limitations
generateDraw.minimumPlayersRequired: At least 4 players are required to generate a draw

drawView.drawNotAvailableDescription: The draw will be published once the event organizers have finalized the teams.
drawView.note: Nota: 25 minutos cada jogo, 2 minutos para troca

adminDrawView.editAssignmentDescription: Click on a player to swap them between teams. Each team must have exactly 2 players.
